props.name: action
props.description: Action identifier passed in click events for event delegation patterns.

props.name: actionArg
props.description: Single argument value passed with the action in click events.

props.name: actionArgs
props.description: Multiple argument values passed with the action in click events.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Sets the aria-label of the button.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the button.

props.name: icon
props.description: Sets the icon.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of button.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: theme
props.description: Sets the theme of the icon inside the button. "outline" for stroked icons, "filled" for solid icons.

props.name: title
props.description: Sets the title of the button.

props.name: variant
props.description: Styles the button to show color, light, dark or destructive action.
